name: oap-email
description: Ask about your email in natural language. Pass any question about your inbox and get a direct answer — no need to know the API. Examples: 'anything urgent today?', 'anything important since yesterday?', 'emails from Amy', 'what came in overnight?', 'anything about the invoice?', 'what needs my attention?', 'show me this week's newsletters'. Also handles sender preferences: 'always treat @facebook.com as noise', 'mark emails from joe@cpa.us as important'.

input.description: JSON with action='ask' and a 'question' field containing your natural language question about email.

question.description: Your natural language question about email. Time expressions (today, yesterday, overnight, this week), sender filters (from Amy), content search (about invoice), and priority queries (anything urgent) are all understood.

output.description: Messages matching your question with sender, subject, priority, and snippet. Also reports how many new messages were scanned from IMAP.
